introSection: Twilight Express is an upcoming steel roller coaster built by Dutch manufacturer Vekoma located at Six Flags Qiddiya City in Al Muzahimiyah, Ar Riyadh, Saudi Arabia.

sections.title: External links
sections.content: * Ride page on the park's website

fullText:
Twilight Express is an upcoming steel roller coaster built by Dutch manufacturer Vekoma located at Six Flags Qiddiya City in Al Muzahimiyah, Ar Riyadh, Saudi Arabia.


 * Ride page on the park's website
